title: Kawaii Food Sticker Sheet
summary: 3x3 grid of cute pastel food stickers  -  avocado, sushi, bubble tea, donut and friends.
prompt: A sticker sheet of nine cute kawaii food illustrations arranged in a 3x3 grid: a smiling avocado with a tiny pit-blush, a happy strawberry, a sleepy bao bun, a winking cup of bubble tea, a giggling sushi roll, a starry-eyed donut with sprinkles, a peace-sign-making cup of ramen, a content cloud of cotton candy, a bashful slice of cheesecake. Each illustration has rounded shapes, big shiny eyes, a thick white sticker border. Pastel color palette, vector-flat illustration style, white background. Square 1:1.
